name: Potential DLL Injection Pattern Detected
notes:
This rule detects potential use of CreateRemoteThread API and LoadLibrary function to inject a DLL into a process.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g
SIGMA Title: CreateRemoteThread API and LoadLibrary
SIGMA Description: Detects potential use of CreateRemoteThread api and LoadLibrary function to inject DLL into a process


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
when the event matches Start Module (custom) matches any of expressions .*\\kernel32\.dll$
when the event matches Start Function (custom) is any of LoadLibraryA
TD_list: APPLY Potential DLL Injection Pattern Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
AND when the event matches Start Module (custom) matches any of expressions .*\\kernel32\.dll$
AND when the event matches Start Function (custom) is any of LoadLibraryA
RED_list: Event name: Potential DLL Injection Pattern Detected
Event description: Detects potential use of CreateRemoteThread API and LoadLibrary function to inject a DLL into a process
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
